name: Dirty Hands
overview: The story is set in Illyria, fictional central European country, towards the end of World War II. A young man infiltrates into the house of a left-wing politician as his secretary. By order of the Communist party, the young man has to kill the politician, who is suspected of a strategy of compromise with other parties.

trailers.title: SCENEGGIATO TV  "LE MANI SPORCHE" DI E.PETRI   1978
